deals.title: Free Birthday Drink + Bonus Stars
deals.description: Join Starbucks Rewards and get a free handcrafted drink on your birthday plus bonus stars when you sign up. Earn stars on every purchase to redeem for free drinks and food.

deals.title: Free Medium Beverage on Signup
deals.description: Sign up for Dunkin' Rewards and get a free medium beverage of your choice on your first visit. Earn points on every purchase toward more free drinks and food.

deals.title: Free Pastry or Coffee
deals.description: Join MyPanera and receive a free pastry or coffee with your first purchase. Members also get exclusive personalized offers throughout the year.

deals.title: Free Drink on Perks Signup
deals.description: Join Caribou Perks and get a free drink of your choice when you sign up. Earn points on every visit to redeem more free drinks and pastries.

deals.title: Free Medium Fries with $1+ Purchase
deals.description: Download the McDonald's app and get free medium fries with any purchase of $1 or more, every Friday with mobile order. Plus exclusive app-only deals weekly.

deals.title: Free Whopper on Royal Perks Signup
deals.description: Sign up for Royal Perks and get a free Whopper sandwich with your first purchase of $1 or more. Earn 10 crowns per dollar to unlock more free food.

deals.title: Free Dave's Single with Purchase
deals.description: Join Wendy's Rewards and get a free Dave's Single burger with any purchase. Earn points on every order to redeem more free food.

deals.title: Free Doritos Locos Taco
deals.description: Sign up for Taco Bell Rewards and get a free Doritos Locos Taco with your first order through the app. Earn points on every purchase for more free food.

deals.title: Free 6-Inch Sub on MVP Signup
deals.description: Join Subway MVP Rewards and get a free 6-inch sub when you make your first purchase via the app. Earn tokens on every order to unlock more free food.

deals.title: Free Chicken Sandwich
deals.description: Sign up for Chick-fil-A One and receive a free original chicken sandwich as a welcome reward. Earn points on every purchase to redeem for free menu items.

deals.title: Free Chips & Guac on Signup
deals.description: Join Chipotle Rewards and get free chips and guacamole after your first purchase. Earn 10 points per dollar to redeem for free entrees, sides, and drinks.

deals.title: Half-Price Drinks via App
deals.description: Order through the Sonic app and get half-price drinks and slushes anytime, plus a free birthday gift and exclusive weekly deals.

deals.title: Free Signature Chicken on Signup
deals.description: Join Popeyes Rewards and get a free piece of signature chicken with your first order. Earn points on every purchase toward more free food.

deals.title: Free Medium Pizza After First Order
deals.description: Join Hut Rewards and earn 2 points per dollar. Earn enough points after your first online order to redeem a free 1-topping medium pizza.

deals.title: Free Pizza After 6 Orders
deals.description: Join Piece of the Pie Rewards and earn 10 points per online order of $5 or more. After 6 orders, redeem your points for a free medium 2-topping pizza.

deals.title: 25% Off Your First Online Order
deals.description: Get 25% off your first online order at Papa John's when you use the promo code at checkout. Valid on regular menu prices.

deals.title: Free Crazy Bread with App Order
deals.description: Order through the Little Caesars app and get free Crazy Bread with your first Pizza Portal pickup order. Earn rewards on every purchase.

deals.title: Free Appetizer or Dessert
deals.description: Join the Olive Garden eClub and receive a free appetizer or dessert with your next meal. Plus exclusive birthday rewards and seasonal offers.

deals.title: Free Appetizer + Birthday Dessert
deals.description: Join TGI Friday's Rewards and get a free appetizer on signup, plus a free dessert on your birthday and bonus points throughout the year.

deals.title: Free Signup Gift + Birthday Reward
deals.description: Join the Applebee's Club and get a free welcome gift plus a special birthday reward. Members receive exclusive offers and news about new menu items.

deals.title: Free Chips & Salsa or Drink
deals.description: Sign up for My Chili's Rewards and get free chips and salsa or a non-alcoholic beverage on every visit. Plus a free dessert on your birthday.

deals.title: Free Bloomin' Onion on Signup
deals.description: Join Dine Rewards and get a free Bloomin' Onion with the purchase of an entree on your first visit after signup. Plus earn rewards across Outback brands.

deals.title: Free Pancakes on Birthday
deals.description: Join the International Bank of Pancakes and get a free stack of pancakes on your birthday, plus earn PanCoins on every visit toward more free food.

deals.title: Free Grand Slam on Birthday
deals.description: Join Denny's Rewards and get a free Grand Slam breakfast on your birthday. Plus a free welcome offer when you sign up and exclusive member deals.

deals.title: Free Slice of Cheesecake
deals.description: Join Cheesecake Rewards and get a free slice of cheesecake with your next visit. Earn points on every purchase toward more free desserts and entrees.
